item.title: K9s
item.description:
This lab introduces you to K9s and a handful of helpful features.

K9s is a terminal- and text-based user interface (TUI) to interact with your Kubernetes clusters. This project aims to make it easier to navigate, observe, and manage your deployed applications in the wild. K9s continually watches Kubernetes for changes and offers subsequent commands to interact with your observed resources.

With K9s you can:

  • View the Kubernetes cluster state through a text-based dashboard
  • Switch view between clusters and namespaces contexts
  • Quickly inspect objects such as descriptions and logs

In this lab, you will learn how to:
